articles.title: Dogecoin Is Elon Musk’s Favorite Cryptocurrency, Here’s Why
articles.description: Billionaire Elon Musk has been Dogecoin’s biggest supporter, and he has not been shy to say it. It was indeed the SpaceX CEO’s tweets that triggered the bull rally that saw the meme coin hit a high of $0.7 last year before starting its slow downtrend. However, even with the fact that Dogecoin has seemingly […]

articles.title: TA – Apecoin Price Rallies Ahead Of The $10 Mark
articles.description: The price of Apecoin (APE) shows strength after bouncing from a weekly low of $3.10 against Tether (USDT). APE price has seen a relief bounce, with Bitcoin (BTC) rallying from a daily low of $19100 to a region of $23,000. articles.title: Billionaire Elon Musk Reveals Why He Supports Meme Asset Dogecoin Over Top Crypto Bitcoin
articles.description: Billionaire Elon Musk is unveiling why he continues to advocate meme asset Dogecoin (DOGE) over the leading digital asset Bitcoin (BTC). In a new interview on Full Send Podcast, the business magnate says that even though DOGE started out as a joke, some of its features outshine what Bitcoin has to offer. “I’m mainly supporting […]

articles.title: Polkadot Sets Sight On $9 As It Claims The 10th Spot On Crypto Top 10
articles.description: Polkadot has been one of the breakout stars of 2022. The cryptocurrency has managed to thrive in a market where most digital assets are taking a beating and losing value rapidly. With its breach of $8, the cryptocurrency has taken another step as it cements its position as one of the largest contenders in the space, dethroning the beloved Dogecoin in the process. Polkadot Takes 10th Place Meme...

articles.title: Binance Adds Shiba Inu To Crypto Card, Enabling SHIB Payments For 60 Million Merchants
articles.description: Shiba Inu has been taking the payments route to provide more utility for the cryptocurrency. Over the past year, numerous brands and merchants have begun to accept the meme coin as a mode of payment, seemingly to leverage the popularity of the coin among investors. articles.title: Ethereum Users Flock to Optimism for Aave Liquidity Mining Launch
articles.description: A new liquidity mining program on Aave has helped push the total value locked in Optimism above $1.5 billion. Optimism has launched another round of token rewards.The Ethereum Layer 2 network announced the start of its latest liquidity mining program Thursday, part of what the chain is calling OP Summer. The project has allocated 5 million OP tokens to DeFi lending giant Aave for distribution...

articles.title: Shiba Inu (SHIB) Goes Green As Binance Visa Card Onboards Meme Coin
articles.description: Summary: Binance Card now supports the Shiba Inu cryptocurrency. The popular meme coin is the 16th largest crypto with over $6 billion in market cap. Users across Europe can leverage Binance Card to make payments using the SHIBA INU coin Such transactions attract zero fees and users can get as high as 8% of their cash back. Support for Ripple (XRP) and Avalanche (AVAX) also rolled out. Binance...

articles.title: Binance Card users now have access to XRP, SHIB and AVAX
articles.description: Binance Card owners now have access to 14 supported cryptocurrencies, including XRP, AVAX and SHIB, among others.

articles.title: Flow Soars Over 50% on Meta NFT Support News
articles.description: FLOW is up 52.2% over the past 24 hours. Flow appears to be benefiting from Metas big NFT play.Per data from CoinGecko, the NFT-focused blockchains FLOW token has jumped 52.2% in the past 24 hours. The token rallied Thursday afternoon minutes after Meta announced that it would expand its NFT feature to 100 countries and added Flow to its list of supported blockchains.Flow was launched by...

articles.title: NEAR Protocol discloses breach of email and SMS data tied to user wallets
articles.description: NEAR Protocol revealed a data breach that exposed user wallet recovery details, including email and phone numbers.
